methodology: Mapped completed/passed/current claims in Handoff, CURRENT_PROGRESS_AUDIT, NEXT_STEP, DECISIONS, README and verification summaries to implementation/evidence paths. Did not rerun full green modules.

claims.rationale: 3A final summary passed with install, startup_api, shortcuts, uninstall and restore_daily_install checks.

claims.claim: Stranger machine does not crash; Chinese degraded readiness exists
claims.rationale: summary ok true; degraded readiness and rebuild checks recorded.

claims.claim: No user model API key required in packaged production path
claims.rationale: production managed_remote and no_local_keys checks passed; DeepSeek is current provider only.

claims.claim: Cloudflare Managed Proxy production deployment passed
claims.rationale: summary status passed; production Worker, D1, secrets names, upstream call, rate/budget failure cases and security scan recorded.

implementation: release-v0.4.6 installer pipeline and installed app
claims.rationale: summary status passed and report includes real install, production dialogue, security scan, uninstall and restore.
summary status passed; release URL, uploaded asset, SHA256 and download verification recorded.
docs consistency command passed before this audit and is rerun in this audit.

claims.claim: Product asset backup and restore verification completed
claims.rationale: Prior evidence existed; this audit independently expanded the external backup and matched sample blobs.

claims.claim: First cleanup still waiting for reboot leftover processing
claims.rationale: pc-cleanup summary shows postRebootLeftoverProcessing deleted 44 directories and failedDirectoryCount 0; docs were stale and were corrected. npm cache remains failed_eperm_after_reboot, so cleanup remains partial.

claims.claim: README current version and current state
claims.rationale: README described v0.3.0 MVP as current while package.json and release evidence show v0.4.6 Alpha; README was corrected.

claims.claim: Model layering / complete multi Agent / mobile / intelligence pipeline not complete
claims.rationale: Current docs correctly keep these items unfinished; no fake passed evidence was created.

noncritical_findings: README current version/status was stale at audit start and has been corrected.
Current progress/Handoff cleanup leftover wording lagged behind pc-cleanup evidence and has been corrected.
CONTEXT unfinished summary and next-step text lagged behind latest product owner instruction and has been corrected.
